posts.text:
Only American citizens should vote in our elections. 

This is common sense and it is consistent with the work I did as Governor of Nebraska. Nebraskans passed a law requiring voter ID. The ballot initiative passed overwhelmingly, 65-35. Nebraskans supported having secure elections then and they support it now.  

I’m proud to support the SAVE America Act.

Happy National Agriculture Week to all Nebraska farmers and ranchers! Nebraska farmers and ranchers produce the safest and most abundant food supply in the world. They are the backbone of our communities. I’m glad to celebrate Nebraska’s producers this week and every week!
Happy St. Patrick’s Day, Nebraska! The cities of O’Neill and Greeley are the Irish capitals of Nebraska. O’Neill is also home to the world’s largest shamrock!

Congratulations to Grand Island native Gary Staab, who was selected to create the bronze bison sculptures headed to the Smithsonian! The statues will stop at the University of Nebraska State Museum-Morrill Hall in Lincoln on March 14 before traveling to the National Mall. Nebraska talent is on display for our nation's 250th!
news.unl.edu/article/bronze-…

The wildfires in Western Nebraska are the largest since Nebraska became a state.
 
My office is here to help amid this historic disaster.
 
For those harmed by the wildfires, the USDA Farm Service Agency Disaster Assistance Program may be able to help.
 
It’s important to document any damages and report them to USDA to ensure assistance.
 
We are happy to answer questions and help Nebraskans impacted by the fire navigate the process.

The website can be found here: fsa.usda.gov/resources/progr…

I am praying for Susie Wiles as she fights breast cancer.


Aishah Hasnie (@aishahhasnie)

POTUS announces his Chief of Staff Susie Wiles has “early stage” breast cancer, “prognosis is excellent.”





— https://nitter.net/aishahhasnie/status/2033574478651781236#m
Photos from my flyover of the wildfires impacting Western Nebraska. The largest in Nebraska history since becoming a state. I am continuing to pray for those affected by this disaster.

I just joined @TeamPillen and @RepAdrianSmith on a flyover of the historic wildfires impacting parts of Western NE. Learn more:

Video

Dale Steele, a proud Nebraskan from Pierce and WWII veteran, became the world's oldest organ donor this week. Even at the end of his life, he found one more way to serve. His story is inspirational. He was a remarkable man.
nebraskapublicmedia.org/en/n…

An important and necessary action taken by Governor Pillen. I continue to monitor and receive updates on these fires. My prayers are with those affected by them and the brave first responders trying to put them out.


Governor Jim Pillen (@TeamPillen)

Today, I declared a state of emergency within Morrill, Garden, Arthur, Keith, Lincoln, Dawson, and Frontier Counties to help combat wildfires.

This proclamation allows the Nebraska Adjutant General, who also serves as State Disaster Coordinator,

The Working Families Tax Cuts supports the next generation of ag leaders. Whether taking over the family business or starting their own operation, it encourages young Nebraskans to enter the ag industry.

We strengthened the Beginning Farmer and Rancher Development Benefit. We extended its coverage from five years to ten years. That gives new producers access to critical risk management tools for longer.
Best of luck to @HuskerMBB in this year's Big Ten Basketball tournament! It's been a historic season for Nebrasketball. Looking forward to watching our team. GBR!

Nebraska is the best place in the world to live.  But for so many potential first-time homebuyers, the market has become out of reach.  The ROAD to Housing Act will help our country increase housing supply.  

This legislation includes my Streamlining Rural Housing Act, which will specifically increase housing supply in rural parts of Nebraska.  This legislation is commonsense and bipartisan.  It should be signed into law.
I’m praying for all the Nebraskans affected by the wildfires in Lancaster County. Thank you to all our brave first responders for their quick response.

My prayers are with the victims of both the attack on a Michigan synagogue and the shooting at Old Dominion University.

Antisemitism and vicious acts against innocent people have no place in America and the world.

Please join me in prayer for all those impacted by these attacks.
